title: Iced and Light Middle Eastern Pita Bread Wrap
description: A brunch-inspired twist on traditional pita bread, featuring a tangy yogurt sauce, crunchy shichimi togarashi, and a refreshing corn-husk wrap.

ingredients.name: Yogurt Sauce
ingredients.notes: Plain, unflavored, low-lactose or non-dairy yogurt works best.

ingredients.name: Pita Bread
ingredients.notes: Soft, lightly toasted pita bread works best.

ingredients.name: Shichimi Togarashi
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for spice level.

ingredients.name: Temper
ingredients.notes: Middle Eastern spice blend, adjust to taste.

instructions: Place a small spoonful of yogurt sauce on the toasted pita bread.
Sprinkle a pinch of shichimi togarashi and temper over the yogurt sauce.
Add a sprinkle of salt and black pepper to taste.
Drizzle a small amount of lemon juice over the filling.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
